mapper.sql:
select ari.ad_recommend_info_id , ari.ad_url , ari.cpc_fee , ari.ad_title
FROM ad_recommend_info ari
mapper.select:
select ari.ad_recommend_info_id , ari.ad_url , ari.cpc_fee , ari.ad_title
,ad_image.resource_id as ad_image_resource_id ,ad_image.resource_name as ad_image_resource_name ,ad_image.resource_path as ad_image_resource_path ,ad_image.related_table_name as ad_image_related_table_name ,ad_image.related_table_key as ad_image_related_table_key ,ad_image.relate_table_column_name as ad_image_relate_table_column_name
FROM ad_recommend_info ari
left join (select resource_id, resource_name, resource_path, related_table_name, related_table_key, relate_table_column_name from static_resources where related_table_name='ad_recommend_info' and relate_table_column_name='ad_image') as ad_image on ad_image.related_table_key=ari.ad_recommend_info_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
